title: Explore the Journey
instructions: Tap each spot. Leo and Pip took quite a journey — no wrong way to explore.

hotspots.label: Shoes
hotspots.revealText: The shoes were waiting the whole time — they didn't mind.

hotspots.label: Green brick
hotspots.revealText: The green brick was interesting — and that is okay.

hotspots.label: Pause Pebble
hotspots.revealText: A pause can help your brain choose what matters next.
